remaining_tasks.name: Visual UAT — hover-to-highlight end-to-end
remaining_tasks.note: blocking human-verify checkpoint — requires developer to run npm run dev and manually test 7 hover scenarios in browser

blockers.description: Task 2 is a blocking human-verify checkpoint. Cannot be automated. Developer must run `npm run dev`, open http://localhost:5173, draw a molecule, and confirm hover-to-highlight works visually.

human_actions_pending.action: Visual UAT: run npm run dev, draw a molecule (benzene recommended), hover each InChI layer chunk and verify atom/bond halos appear correctly. See Task 2 in 04-03-PLAN.md for full 7-test checklist.
human_actions_pending.context: Phase 4 goal is hover-to-highlight integration. All automated tests pass. Visual confirmation is the final gate before phase is complete.

human_actions_pending.action: Commit the uncommitted `src/lib/highlightUtils.ts` change (resolveVar oklch→rgb fix via canvas). This is a real bug fix required for Ketcher Raphaël renderer compatibility.
human_actions_pending.context: getComputedStyle returns oklch() strings which Raphaël SVG renderer cannot parse. The fix uses a 1x1 canvas to normalise any color format to rgb(). Not yet committed.

decisions.decision: resolveVar now converts oklch to rgb via 1x1 canvas normalisation
decisions.rationale: Ketcher uses Raphaël SVG renderer which cannot parse oklch() color strings. CSS custom properties return oklch from getComputedStyle. Canvas fillStyle+getImageData is the reliable cross-browser way to normalise any color format.

next_action: 1. Commit the highlightUtils.ts fix: `git add src/lib/highlightUtils.ts && git commit -m 'fix(04-03): convert oklch CSS vars to rgb for Ketcher Raphaël renderer'`. 2. Run `npm run dev`. 3. Open http://localhost:5173, draw benzene, run visual UAT (7 tests in Task 2 of 04-03-PLAN.md). 4. Type 'approved' to clear the Task 2 gate.
context_notes: Phase 4 is one UAT session away from completion. The resolveVar fix was discovered during integration — Ketcher Raphaël renderer silently rejects oklch colors, so highlights would render with wrong/no color without the canvas normalisation workaround. Everything else is clean.
